Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Text Ruling

RULING: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE

Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion for trial setting preference is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to provide the court with courtesy copies of moving papers pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 2.7(B). Order signed in chambers. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok and E. Larnauti. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto of SCANLAN STONE, CSR #5229, reporter@scanlanstone.com (Tel: 510-451-1580). (503/CML)
